creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Oct 17, 2000 at 05:15:40PM -0700, keith.jones@ieee.org wrote:
> I contacted the maintainers of slib/scheme48 and gnucash, none have 
> replied.

cobra 66% cd /usr/ports/deskutils/gnucash && make maintainer
ade@FreeBSD.org

Like hell you did.

lang/slib needs to be fixed properly, or the newer version of scheme48
needs to be backed out until the slib problem is solved.

-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.			ade@FreeBSD.org
